title: Robert Mare's legacy: Multi-generational processes
abstract: This paper summarizes some of Robert Mare's major contributions as a sociologist, demographer, and social statistician; as a pioneer who advanced the multi -generational perspective in social science research; as a leader who introduced demographic thinking to social mobility studies; and as a trailblazer who devel-oped new approaches to studying multi-generational processes
journal: Research in Social Stratification and Mobility
